targets.query: from(bucket: "kelonia") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "temperature" and r.sensor == "kelonia/SHT41") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "kelonia") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "humidite" and r.sensor == "kelonia/SHT41") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "kelonia") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "vibration" and (r.sensor == "kelonia/MPU6050" or r.sensor == "kelonia/vibration")) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "kelonia") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r._field == "tension") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
